title: Get the unpaid amount of a BC
content:
Use this endpoint to get total unpaid amount of your Business Center account. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform invoice related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/invoice/unpaid/get/| /v1.3/bc/invoice/unpaid/get/| |Request parameter data type|` bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/unpaid/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |invoice_type{Required}|string| Invoice type. Enum values: `RECON` (Reconciliation Invoice).| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/unpaid/get/ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "invoice_type": "RECON" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| #|result|object|The result of the currency and the unpaid amount. | ##|currency_code|string|Currency code.| ##|amount|number|Total unpaid amount in related currency. | |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 40002, "message": "ReadObjectCB: expect \" after {, but found {, error found in #10 byte of ...|bc_id\": {{advertiser|..., bigger context ...|{\n\t\"bc_id\": {{advertiser_id}},\n \"invoice_type\": \"RECON\"\n}|...", "request_id": "{{request_id}}" } (/code) ```
